title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
